hooks.command: if [ -f "./.agents/scripts/post-tool.sh" ]; then bash ./.agents/scripts/post-tool.sh; else bash "$HOME/.gemini/config/scripts/post-tool.sh"; fi
if [ -f "./.agents/scripts/pre-tool.sh" ]; then bash ./.agents/scripts/pre-tool.sh; else bash "$HOME/.gemini/config/scripts/pre-tool.sh"; fi
